jobs.purpose: Dispatched by the payment::PaymentDisputeLost listener. Creates a Chargeback row from a lost PaymentDispute — snapshots reason_code + reason_category + reason_description from the parent PaymentDispute + copies network + amount + currency + provider + provider_reference_id. Sets status='pending_evidence' + computes evidence_due_by from the bank-communicated window (per-network default: Visa 30d / Mastercard 45d / Amex 20d / Discover 30d). Fires ChargebackFiled + dispatches CollectChargebackEvidenceJob.
steps: Load parent PaymentDispute + Payment + Invoice
Idempotency check: refuse when a Chargeback already exists for this payment_dispute_id (returns silently — the listener may fire multiple times on transient failures)
Compute evidence_due_by: NOW() + per-network default window (from config chargeback.evidence.deadline_days_by_network)
Compute rdr_eligible: network='visa' AND amount_cents <= config chargeback.rdr.auto_refund_threshold_cents AND tenant holds chargeback_rdr entitlement AND payment.amount_refunded_cents == 0
Compute ce3_eligible: network='visa' AND reason_category='fraud' AND tenant holds chargeback_ce3 entitlement AND customer has >= 2 prior successful payments in last 120 days
INSERT INTO chargebacks (status='pending_evidence', evidence_due_by=?, rdr_eligible=?, ce3_eligible=?, ...)
UPDATE payments SET amount_disputed_cents = amount_disputed_cents + chargeback.amount_cents (idempotent — additive)
Fire ChargebackFiled (P0)
Dispatch CollectChargebackEvidenceJob (auto-collect pre-populates the evidence bundle)
Dispatch NotifyChargebackEvidenceOverdueJob at (evidence_due_by - 7 days) + (evidence_due_by - 3 days) + (evidence_due_by - 1 day) scheduled cadence
Emit academorix.chargeback.filed_total counter labelled by network + reason_category

jobs.purpose: Auto-collects evidence pieces from invoice + membership + notifications + support modules. Runs immediately on chargeback creation to pre-populate the evidence bundle. Admin reviews + potentially edits the auto-collected evidence before submitting via POST /chargebacks/{chargeback}/evidence. Does NOT submit to the provider — that's SubmitChargebackEvidenceJob's job.
steps: Load Chargeback + parent Payment + Invoice + customer
Collect invoice_evidence: invoice::InvoiceRepository::pdfSignedUrl($invoice_id) + line items
Collect receipt_evidence: payment::PaymentRepository::receiptUrl($payment_id) + receipt_number + receipt_date
Collect service_documentation: attendance::AttendanceRepository::forInvoice($invoice_id) — service dates + attendance records + coach signatures (when attendance module is present)
Collect refund_policy: settings::SettingsRepository::get($tenant_id, 'refund_policy') + freeze snapshot at purchase time
Collect communication_log: notifications::NotificationRepository::forCustomer + support::TicketRepository::forCustomer — every message + ticket + call recording within 60 days of purchase
Collect shipping_docs: NULL for pure service tenants; when physical goods sold, delegate to fulfillment module (Wave 5+)
Collect customer_signature_evidence: payment::PaymentRepository::checkoutSignature($payment_id) + IP + device_fingerprint_hash + timestamp
Cache the collected bundle in rfd:evidence-draft:{chargeback_id} (30d TTL) for admin review — NOT persisted to chargeback_evidence table until admin submits
Emit academorix.chargeback.evidence_auto_collected_total counter + academorix.chargeback.evidence_completeness_percent histogram

jobs.purpose: Dispatched when admin submits evidence via POST /chargebacks/{chargeback}/evidence. Persists the ChargebackEvidence row + dispatches the evidence to the provider via payment::PaymentProviderManager. Transitions chargeback status pending_evidence -> evidence_submitted. Provider async response transitions to under_bank_review later.
steps: Load Chargeback + latest ChargebackEvidence row (submission_attempt_number = max)
Refuse when chargeback.status NOT IN ('pending_evidence', 'evidence_submitted') — cannot submit past the deadline or on terminal states
Resolve provider driver: paymentProviderManager.instance(chargeback.provider_instance_name)
Call driver->submitChargebackEvidence(chargeback.provider_reference_id, evidence_bundle)
On 2xx: UPDATE chargebacks SET status='evidence_submitted', evidence_submitted_at=NOW()
On 4xx non-recoverable (evidence rejected by provider): fire ChargebackEvidenceRequested with additional_evidence_requested=true + network_request_notes=provider_error_message
On 5xx transient: retry per backoff schedule
Fire ChargebackEvidenceSubmitted
Emit academorix.chargeback.evidence_submissions_total counter + academorix.chargeback.provider_dispatch_duration_ms histogram

jobs.purpose: Dispatched by CreateChargebackFromDisputeJob at three scheduled times relative to evidence_due_by (7 days before / 3 days before / 1 day before). Fires ChargebackEvidenceOverdue + sends escalating cadence notifications to admin. Idempotent — refuses re-fire when evidence has already been submitted OR chargeback is in a terminal state.
steps: Load Chargeback; refuse when status != 'pending_evidence' (evidence already submitted OR terminal)
Compute days_remaining = evidence_due_by - NOW() rounded to days
Compute current_evidence_completeness_percent from cache rfd:evidence-draft:{chargeback_id}
Fire ChargebackEvidenceOverdue with days_remaining
Dispatch ChargebackEvidenceOverdueNotification (P2 at 7 days, P1 at 3 days, P0 at 1 day) to every user holding chargebacks.viewAny + chargebacks.submit-evidence
Record dispatched_at on chargeback.metadata.overdue_notifications for idempotency
Emit academorix.chargeback.evidence_overdue_total counter labelled by days_remaining

jobs.purpose: Polls the provider periodically for chargebacks in status='evidence_submitted' + 'under_bank_review'. Reconciles our record against the provider's authoritative status. Per-provider cadence configurable (Stripe hourly / Adyen hourly / Paddle 4h / etc.). Dispatched by MonitorChargebackRateJob nightly for every non-terminal chargeback.
steps: SELECT id, provider, provider_reference_id FROM chargebacks WHERE status IN ('evidence_submitted', 'under_bank_review') AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 200
For each: resolve provider driver + call driver->getChargeback(provider_reference_id)
Compare provider-native status to our local status
If provider returned 'under_review' + we're evidence_submitted: UPDATE status='under_bank_review' + fire ChargebackUnderReview + fire ChargebackReconciled with drift_detected=true
If provider returned 'won' + we're not terminal: UPDATE status='won' + fire ChargebackWon + fire ChargebackReconciled with drift_detected=true
If provider returned 'lost' + we're not terminal: UPDATE status='lost' + dispatch FinalizeChargebackJob + fire ChargebackLost + fire ChargebackReconciled with drift_detected=true
If provider status matches ours: UPDATE updated_at=NOW() (touch), fire ChargebackReconciled with drift_detected=false
If provider returns 404 (reference not found — investigate ops): UPDATE metadata.reconcile_error='provider_reference_not_found' + P2 alert
Emit academorix.chargeback.polls_total counter labelled by provider + terminal_state

jobs.purpose: Dispatched by ChargebackObserver.updating when status transitions to `lost` OR `expired`. Runs the finalization chain: records TWO offsetting Transactions (disputed amount + network fee) + updates parent Invoice state + fires clawback events (ChargebackClawbackReferral + ChargebackClawbackCoupon) + fires marketing::ChargebackFiled negative-value + fraud signal. All 5 steps run in the same DB transaction — a Chargeback row NEVER exists in status=lost/expired without its two transactions + invoice state update. On failure, the whole chain rolls back (transient) OR the chargeback stays in the terminal status with metadata.finalization_error set for manual investigation via `chargeback:reconcile`.
steps: Open DB transaction
Step 1: transaction::TransactionRecorder::recordChargebackLoss($chargeback) — offsetting ledger movement (debit chargebacks_expense, credit cash). Persists transaction_id on chargeback row.

Step 2: chargeback::NetworkFeeCalculator::compute($chargeback) + transaction::TransactionRecorder::recordChargebackFee($chargeback, $feeCents) — network fee ledger movement (debit chargeback_fees, credit cash). Persists fee_transaction_id on chargeback row. Fires ChargebackNetworkFeeRecorded.

Step 3: invoice::InvoiceStateUpdater::markDisputed($chargeback) — updates parent invoice.status='disputed' + payment.amount_disputed_cents. Fires invoice::CreditNoteIssuer::createFromChargeback for the tax-reversal credit note (when reason_category != 'card_recovery').

Step 4: chargeback::ClawbackCoordinator::fanOut($chargeback) — dispatches ChargebackClawbackReferral (when materialized referral reward exists) + ChargebackClawbackCoupon (when redeemed coupon exists).
Step 5: chargeback::FireMarketingChargebackFiled($chargeback) — dispatches marketing::ChargebackFiled negative-value conversion + fraud signal event.
Commit transaction

On any step failure: rollback + UPDATE chargebacks SET metadata.finalization_error=? + fire ChargebackReconciled with drift_detected=true + emit academorix.chargeback.finalization_failures_total counter
Emit academorix.chargeback.finalizations_total counter labelled by success/failure

jobs.purpose: Nightly. Finds chargebacks past their evidence_due_by that are still in status='pending_evidence' + transitions them to `expired`. The transition dispatches FinalizeChargebackJob (auto-loss finalization chain). Idempotent — refuses re-fire on already-expired rows.
steps: SELECT id FROM chargebacks WHERE status='pending_evidence' AND evidence_due_by < NOW() AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 500
For each: UPDATE chargebacks SET status='expired', decision_at=NOW(), decision_reason='evidence_deadline_missed'
Fire ChargebackExpired
Dispatch FinalizeChargebackJob (invokes the LOST finalization chain for auto-loss)
Emit academorix.chargeback.expired_total counter

jobs.purpose: Nightly. Computes rolling 60-day chargeback rate per tenant per network. Alerts when rate crosses the network's VDMP/MDMP threshold (0.9% Visa / 1.5% Mastercard / 1.0% Amex / 1.0% Discover). Also dispatches CheckChargebackStatusJob per-provider for every non-terminal chargeback (reconciliation loop).
steps: For each tenant with chargeback_rate_monitoring entitlement + at least one payment in the last 60 days:
For each network: compute rate = chargebacks_count / transactions_count over rolling 60d window
Compare rate against config chargeback.rate_monitoring.threshold_<network>_percent (default 0.009 Visa / 0.015 Mastercard / 0.01 Amex / 0.01 Discover)
When rate >= threshold: fire ChargebackRateThresholdExceeded + dispatch ChargebackRateThresholdExceededNotification (P1 admin + Academorix platform ops)
When rate < threshold BUT was above threshold within last 7 days: fire ChargebackRateThresholdClearing (informational)
Dispatch CheckChargebackStatusJob per-provider for every non-terminal chargeback (reconciliation loop)
Emit academorix.chargeback.rate_percent gauge labelled by network + academorix.chargeback.rate_threshold_exceeded_total counter

jobs.purpose: Weekly. Hard-purge chargebacks + chargeback_evidence past 7-year (or 10-year Enterprise) retention. Invoice-linked chargebacks migrate to compliance_archive.chargebacks + compliance_archive.chargeback_evidence prior to cascade (financial-obligation retention). Non-invoice-linked chargebacks hard-delete. Audit rows outlive per audit module design.
steps: Compute retention cutoff per tenant: chargeback_extended_retention on = 10y; off = 7y (from decision_at, or filed_at if never terminal — rare)
For each tenant: SELECT chargebacks WHERE decision_at < cutoff AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 5000
For each chargeback: if invoice_id is set + parent invoice still exists in compliance_archive: INSERT INTO compliance_archive.chargebacks + compliance_archive.chargeback_evidence
DELETE FROM chargebacks (FK CASCADE handles chargeback_evidence)
Emit academorix.chargeback.retention_purged_total counter labelled by entity (chargebacks / chargeback_evidence) + destination (hard_delete / compliance_archive)
